title: Sacrifice
content:
Though love repine, and reason chafe,
    There came a voice without reply,--
    ''T is man's perdition to be safe,
    When for the truth he ought to die.'
meaning:
"Sacrifice" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
